title: stripper operation
description: Counter-current multistage gas stripper (Kremser) -- the inverse of the absorber.  A rich liquid (top) is contacted with a lean stripping gas (bottom) to drive the solute OUT of the liquid.  Hardware-only: the number of theoretical stages.  The per-solute removal is a RESULT; the key group is the stripping factor S = K*V/L.  For 'I need 95 % removal' wrap the unit in a DesignSpec on $stages.

stages.title: Theoretical stages (hardware)
stages.description: Number of equilibrium stages = the column height.  More stages give more stripping (the Kremser chart).
